textByHashes.56d8c2084345f345119f741e8e3bc1881b874821: Thou is a foul agent of Lucien! Such an agent must die!
textByHashes.be80684c57bd2dd6a404f065668db7106098c67b: Thou hast ventured deep into the tunnels, you have reached the temple of our master. It is many ages since a pilgrim has come here.
textByHashes.028dfa1e43df1e91522c3ff40dcfc6dcbdddca6d: We are the guardians of the staff, our fathers were guardians and our fathers' fathers before that. Why dost thou seek it?
textByHashes.c803240b0a6d93004dc02b11d4a7b64ca6d8a934: Thou art working for that spawn of evil?! Fool! You must be cleansed to save your soul!
textByHashes.c19f5c04bf3fbe95b9edf730e401e35166cc2072: An agent of evil cannot be allowed to leave!
textByHashes.2b0516e2559d5646383cd3ade4dabcb31cf045e3: Lucien must not get hold of the staff! He would become too powerful!
textByHashes.abe46fc364124b4cea474b03ba0d490cb8529461: Hast thou come across the undead necromancer? It was he that raised an army of the undead against Varrock a generation ago. If you know where he is you can help us defeat him.
textByHashes.31015af1af1625410f601790d5c1456534ac63c4: He must be gaining in power again. If you can defeat him he will be banished from this plane for a while. You will need this pendant to attack him.
textByHashes.62da2f0b2ec0221358b56d77a472360c51de3688: Fool! You will die for your sins!
textByHashes.fb24dd114908265b72754207f08a382b60055e9e: Linger a while and be at peace.
textByHashes.3fbbba1bf4f599e29580f497540a7b830efab537: The staff is sacred! You will not have it!
textByHashes.587c9443430d391e81612725442df3815e34a592: Your worldly greed has darkened your soul!
textByHashes.04fbfb9237d52e72c6685ec27bbcc081d6687d65: I may be a fool but I will not step aside!
textByHashes.135bdb18450ce8e57d8b36f45ed1ccad858b4b5f: Only members of our order are allowed to handle the staff.
textByHashes.adc5964d4dbe5e5df728c9939efb94c5f577b94e: That is a wise decision. Stay a while and let your soul be cleansed!
textByHashes.98ea49b69243ab186b106d41884ae05d5d5c3a6e: We are the Guardians of Armadyl. We have kept the temple safe for many ages. The evil in the dungeons seek what lies here. The Mahjarrat are the worst.
textByHashes.b6fc033522b6f478c549d7f8e37246ab13479424: Armadyl is the god we serve. We have been charged with guarding his sacred arctifacts until he requires them.
textByHashes.28cff04d49d29e2cf8dd76f0987e00ce89626135: Saradominists. Bleh. They only acknowledge those three. There are at least twenty gods!
textByHashes.2cbbece244d39f538ea7f6faf5f921849d2e88d6: They are ancient and powerful beings! They are very evil! It is said that they once dominated this plane of existence, Zamorak was supposedly of their blood. They are far fewer in number now.
textByHashes.8d5bfca719031abcbefc4ef41e1e81f3cf81b409: Some still have presence in this world in their liche forms. Mahjarrat such as Lucien and Azzanadra would become very powerful if they came into possession of the Staff of Armadyl.
textByHashes.c98397faaf4df70563e2fc3df3e5532cd6cd3407: You are a fool to be working for Lucien! Your soul must be cleansed to save you!
textByHashes.23cce892cc41370ce64d9443abd848ae5ef88280: Do not fear! We are devoted to our charge!
textByHashes.9dfcbc49ad238765a4f2dca92017c8f82e675494: No! I am not old! My family has guarded the staff for many generations.
textByHashes.0ed62dd46b8e8d5a230e0fd0cf7fa4250bfa00ed: Halt! You will not leave here with the Staff of Armadyl!
textByHashes.06002c5dacf0eca64e87cbb52225c67142610f5c: Hurry friend! Time is against us!
textByHashes.d27514c3e96c86c5d39f89c0ed1d4b76f9d5c7e8: That is not thine to take!
textByHashes.7cb606d35f3c66ced7df3c0ef97db6b363cd33a5: Hello there. I have a message for you.
textByHashes.957fe1fcd37d31eca7216ce79dcd6d494777937d: Sorry, I don't have anything for you right now.
textByHashes.464b5ba352dd13b8d97b48112dad108ea6d61cfa: ? I have a message for you.
textByHashes.bda5764d74e0c0a860b8f1d2ea16772d21ce0f44: Well done friend! He will not be able to return for a while, this is good news!
textByHashes.468c517673c9d4643dcbf8fbe52260414372e2b5: I'm sure you've got one stored somewhere.
